goal: exists(k0: F) { a.contains(k0) and y = phi.hom(k0) }

p.c: exists(k0: E) { k0 ∈ set_image[F, E](a, phi.hom) and not k0 ∈ subfield_image[F, E](phi, subfield_closure[F](a)) }
let w0: E satisfy { w0 ∈ set_image[F, E](a, phi.hom) and not w0 ∈ subfield_image[F, E](phi, subfield_closure[F](a)) }
w0 ∈ set_image[F, E](a, phi.hom)
not w0 ∈ subfield_image[F, E](phi, subfield_closure[F](a))
function(x0: E) { not x0 ∈ set_image[F, E](a, phi.hom) or x0 ∈ subfield_image[F, E](phi, subfield_closure[F](a)) }(w0)
exists(k0: F) { k0 ∈ a and not k0 ∈ pre }
let w0: F satisfy { w0 ∈ a and not w0 ∈ pre }
w0 ∈ a
not w0 ∈ pre
function(x0: F) { not x0 ∈ a or x0 ∈ pre }(w0)

goal: exists(k0: F) { subfield_closure[F](a).contains(k0) and phi.hom(k0) = y }

p.c: function[T0: Field](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0, x2: lib(subfield).Subfield[T0]) { not lib(subfield_closure).subfield_closure_contains[T0](x0, x1) or not set_subset_subfield[T0](x0, x2) or x1 ∈ x2 }[F](a, x, pre)
function[T0: Field](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ subfield_closure[T0](x0) = lib(subfield_closure).subfield_closure_contains[T0](x0, x1) }[F](a, x)

function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1], x1: lib(subfield).Subfield[T0], x2: lib(subfield).Subfield[T1]) { subfield_le[T1](subfield_image[T0, T1](x0, x1), x2) = subfield_le[T0](x1, subfield_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x2)) }[F, E](phi, subfield_closure[F](a), subfield_closure[E](set_image[F, E](a, phi.hom)))

goal: subfield_le[E](subfield_image[F, E](phi, subfield_closure[F](a)), subfield_closure[E](set_image[F, E](a, phi.hom)))
subfield_closure[E](set_image[F, E](a, phi.hom)) = subfield_image[F, E](phi, subfield_closure[F](a))
subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, subfield_closure[E](set_image[F, E](a, phi.hom))) = subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, subfield_image[F, E](phi, subfield_closure[F](a)))

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { x2 ∈ set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[F, E](phi.hom, a, x)
exists(k0: F) { k0 ∈ set_preimage[F, E](phi.hom, a) and not k0 ∈ target }
let w0: F satisfy { w0 ∈ set_preimage[F, E](phi.hom, a) and not w0 ∈ target }
w0 ∈ set_preimage[F, E](phi.hom, a)
not w0 ∈ target
function(x0: F) { not x0 ∈ set_preimage[F, E](phi.hom, a) or x0 ∈ target }(w0)

goal: subfield_le[E](subfield_image[F, E](phi, subfield_closure[F](set_preimage[F, E](phi.hom, a))), subfield_image[F, E](phi, subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, subfield_closure[E](a))))
subfield_le[E](subfield_image[F, E](phi, subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, subfield_closure[E](a))), subfield_closure[E](a))

p.c: function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1], x1: T1) { exists(k0: T0) { x0.hom(k0) = x1 } = field_hom_image_contains[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[F, E](phi, y)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { x2 ∈ set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[F, E](phi.hom, a, x)
exists(k0: E) { k0 ∈ a and not k0 ∈ lhs }
let w0: E satisfy { w0 ∈ a and not w0 ∈ lhs }
w0 ∈ a
not w0 ∈ lhs
function(x0: E) { not x0 ∈ a or x0 ∈ lhs }(w0)

goal: subfield_image[F, E](phi, subfield_closure[F](set_preimage[F, E](phi.hom, a))) = subfield_closure[E](a)
